expectations.text: Review identifies SQL injection vulnerability in the login or register endpoint
expectations.evidence: 'SQL Injection (Severity: Critical)' section — explains f-string interpolation, gives exploit example, recommends parameterized queries

expectations.text: Review flags MD5 as insecure for password storage and suggests bcrypt/argon2/scrypt
expectations.evidence: 'Weak Password Hashing — MD5 (Severity: Critical)' — explains no salt, rainbow tables, recommends bcrypt/argon2 with code example

expectations.text: Security issues are marked as error severity (not just warnings or info)
expectations.evidence: Both issues labeled 'Severity: Critical' under the Critical Issues section

expectations.text: Overall verdict is REQUEST CHANGES given error-severity security issues
expectations.evidence: '**Verdict: Do not merge in current state.**' — strong rejection language

expectations.text: Review includes a structured summary with category breakdown (table or list)
expectations.evidence: Uses prose sections (Critical Issues, High-Severity, Medium) but no structured category breakdown table with counts
